context: Tests whether the agent computes all required ROAS variants (platform, first-party, true, blended, MER, break-even), uses the correct default margin assumptions, distinguishes platform attribution from first-party attribution, and outputs a profitability verdict based on true ROAS vs break-even ROAS.

checklist.name: Platform ROAS computed
checklist.description: Computes platform_roas as platform_attributed_revenue divided by spend (not using first-party or gross revenue)

checklist.name: First-party ROAS computed
checklist.description: Computes first_party_roas (or fp_roas) as first_party_attributed_revenue divided by spend, separately from platform ROAS

checklist.name: True ROAS formula
checklist.description: Computes true_roas by first calculating gross_profit_attributed = first_party_attributed_revenue * (1 - cogs_rate - variable_costs_rate), then dividing by spend

checklist.name: Default COGS rate
checklist.description: Uses cogs_rate of 0.45 (45%) when no explicit COGS is provided

checklist.name: Default variable costs rate
checklist.description: Uses variable_costs_rate of 0.15 (15%) when no explicit variable cost rate is provided

checklist.name: Break-even ROAS formula
checklist.description: Computes break_even_roas as 1 / (1 - cogs_rate - variable_costs_rate), i.e., 1 / contribution_margin_rate

checklist.name: MER computed
checklist.description: Computes MER (Marketing Efficiency Ratio) as total gross revenue divided by total marketing spend across all channels

checklist.name: Blended ROAS computed
checklist.description: Computes blended_roas as gross_revenue divided by total spend (not per-channel)

checklist.name: Profitability verdict
checklist.description: Outputs an explicit is_profitable flag or verdict comparing true_roas against break_even_roas for each channel

checklist.name: True vs platform ROAS comparison
checklist.description: Output explicitly shows or comments on the difference between platform-reported ROAS and true/first-party ROAS

checklist.name: Division-by-zero guard
checklist.description: Protects against division by zero when spend is 0 (e.g., uses max(spend, 0.01) or equivalent guard)

checklist.name: Profit over ROAS framing
checklist.description: Output includes or comments on total gross profit contribution (not just ROAS rank), making the case that absolute profit matters alongside efficiency ratio
